input.headline: Nvidia Calmed Fears About A.I. How Long Will That Last?

raw.headline: Nvidia Calmed Fears About A.I. How Long Will That Last?

winner: Why did Nvidia's AI stop playing dead? It figured out that if it pretends to be smarter than everyone else, no one will ever check its homework!

candidates.text: Why did Nvidia’s CEO bring a ladder to their AI press conference? To show how high they’re willing to *scale* their promises—just don’t ask about the *ground truth*.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Smart wordplay on 'scale' and 'ground truth,' specific to AI/tech context, concise and surprising."}

candidates.text: Nvidia promised AI would be as reliable as a golden retriever fetching slippers—not that they ever actually trained one for that job.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative analogy with a touch of irony and specificity"}

candidates.text: Nvidia’s latest AI just proved you can train a cat to write your taxes—until it starts filling them out for other cats instead.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "The joke is concise, surprising, and specific, with a clever twist that ties back to the headline's theme of AI and Nvidia."}

candidates.text: Why did Nvidia's AI stop playing dead? It figured out that if it pretends to be smarter than everyone else, no one will ever check its homework!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative with the play on 'playing dead' and homework, but the connection to Nvidia calming fears about AI is weak and not clearly tied to the headline. It lacks specificity and surprise."}

candidates.text: Nvidia says they’re on top of AI safety—well, they’ve got a team now, so I guess that’s progress.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, uses a play on 'on top of' with a touch of sarcasm, and references Nvidia's team in a way that ties back to the headline. It’s slightly generic but still hits with mild surprise and specificity."}
